'''waluhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:plagiogranite|plagiogranite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-l-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:plagiogranite|plagiogranite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| waluhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wælihith|wælihith]] || [[word:wælihij|wælihij]] || [[word:wælihish|wælihish]] || [[word:wælihi|wælihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:waluluhuth|waluluhuth]] || [[word:waluluhuj|waluluhuj]] || [[word:waluluhush|waluluhush]] || [[word:waluluhu|waluluhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:waluhuth|waluhuth]] || [[word:waluhuj|waluhuj]] || [[word:waluhush|waluhush]] || [[word:waluhu|waluhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:walufhuth|walufhuth]] || [[word:walufhuj|walufhuj]] || [[word:walufhush|walufhush]] || [[word:walufhuf|walufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:waluhuthu|waluhuthu]] || [[word:waluhuju|waluhuju]] || [[word:waluhushu|waluhushu]] || [[word:waluhuku|waluhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:waluhuth|waluhuth]] || [[word:waluhuj|waluhuj]] || [[word:waluhush|waluhush]] || [[word:waluhu|waluhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:waluhuthul|waluhuthul]] || [[word:waluhujul|waluhujul]] || [[word:waluhushul|waluhushul]] || [[word:waluhukul|waluhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:waluhuthuthu|waluhuthuthu]] || [[word:waluhujuju|waluhujuju]] || [[word:waluhushushu|waluhushushu]] || [[word:waluhuku|waluhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:waluhuthun|waluhuthun]] || [[word:waluhujun|waluhujun]] || [[word:waluhushun|waluhushun]] || [[word:waluhukun|waluhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:waluhuthuoro|waluhuthuoro]] || [[word:waluhujuoro|waluhujuoro]] || [[word:waluhushuoro|waluhushuoro]] || [[word:waluhukuoro|waluhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
